title: NHDTA-529 Cleaning, washing, taking care of Ji Po ... Naked housekeeper obliged to do shameful housework
overview: A housekeeper who became obedient because of the weakness of the hired man. She is forced to do housework by being made naked without being able to defy the man. Furthermore, the request escalated, "cleaning the tide that was squid and leaked", "naked in front of a friend invited at a party", "SEX while cooking". It is a must-see for her to endure pleasure desperately while being ashamed of her position as a housekeeper!
